message:
fix(mvcc,pager,btree,vfs): harden transaction pipeline and page allocation

MVCC write coordinator:
- Expand SSI validation with improved conflict detection
- Refine witness paths for better serialization ordering
- Improve index regeneration edge cases

Pager:
- Reuse pages freed by the current transaction before allocating new ones
- Skip the pending-byte page (page at offset 0x40000000 / page_size + 1)
  during allocation, matching C SQLite behavior that reserves this page
  for locking coordination

B-tree:
- Use FrankenError::internal() instead of DatabaseCorrupt for interior
  replacement rebalance refusal (this is an internal logic path, not
  corruption)
- Add bounds check in freelist trunk page serialization for pages < 8 bytes

VFS:
- Set bigEndCksum flag based on target endianness instead of hardcoding
  little-endian, ensuring correct WAL checksum verification on big-endian

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -177,7 +177,7 @@ fn build_empty_sqlite_wal_shm_header(
     write_ne_u32(&mut hdr, 4, 0); // unused
     write_ne_u32(&mut hdr, 8, 0); // iChange
     hdr[12] = 1; // isInit
-    hdr[13] = 0; // bigEndCksum (normal little-endian WAL checksums)
+    hdr[13] = if cfg!(target_endian = "big") { 1 } else { 0 }; // bigEndCksum
     hdr[14..16].copy_from_slice(&sz_page_u16.to_ne_bytes());
     write_ne_u32(&mut hdr, 16, 0); // mxFrame (empty WAL)
     write_ne_u32(&mut hdr, 20, n_page);
